description:
**Bot Request**
--------------
"𝕷᥆᥆k ᥣіkᥱ ᥲ gіrᥣ, ᑲᥙ𝗍 𝕴 𝗍һіᥒk ᥣіkᥱ ᥲ gᥙᥡ"
--------------
Since certain people in my old saint bot seem to not have the proper skill to read a text, I'll be clear yet again.
This bot is not an animal, it's an anthropomorfic creature, don't know what that means? Google it before posting shit, thank you
Don't get me wrong, I take criticism, I don't take hate, if you don't have anything to add besides saying something is bad, you might as well not say anything
